title: BotArmy
description: This is a mod that can summon your own army of players. It uses carpet mod's fake player summoning capabilities to spawn offline players. You can command this army to attack any player on the server!!
body:
Ever wanted your own personal army of pro Minecraft players? The Bot Army Mod lets you summon highly intelligent, fully-geared bots to defend your base, patrol your world, or hunt down your enemies! It uses carpet mod to achive this

### ✨Bot AI

* 🧠 **State Machine:** Bots now have distinct behavioral states.
* **IDLE:** Stand guard at their post and scan the perimeter.
* **PATROL:** Actively roam around, avoiding ledges and cliffs natively.
* **ATTACK:** Hunt down the target relentlessly (safety protocols disengaged!).


* ⚔️ **Advanced 1.9+ PvP Mechanics:**
* Bots now respect **attack cooldowns** (no more weak spam clicking).
* **Class System:** Bots spawn with a randomized offhand. **50%** will use **Shields** (and actively block-hit), while the other **50%** use **Totems of Undying** and play hyper-aggressively.
* **Tactical Retreat & Healing:** If a bot drops below 4 hearts, it will physically turn around, sprint away, and eat a Golden Apple.


* 🐀 **"Cornered Rat" Logic:** If you chase a retreating/healing bot and get too close, it will stop eating, whip around, and fight back to knock you away before resuming its retreat.

### 🏃 Unstoppable Mobility & Anti-Stuck

* 🔮 **Ender Pearl Escapes:** Bots now monitor their own movement. If they detect they have been stuck in a 1x1 hole for 2 seconds, or are trapped in water unable to reach you, they will equip an Ender Pearl, aim up, and pearl out of the trap!
  
* 💨 **Wind Charge Jumping:** If a bot is stuck at the base of a wall trying to reach a player above them, they will look down and fire a Wind Charge to launch themselves up.

### 🎭 Spawning & Quality of Life

* ♾️ **Infinite Spawning Loop:** Spawning large armies (`/army spawn 50`) is stable. The mod intelligently prevents duplicate names from being spawned in the same batch, and automatically appends suffixes if you request more bots than the name pool holds.How evey it is recommended to keep the number of bots less than 50
  
* 💎 **"Good Gear" Default Loadout:** All bots spawn fully kitted in Prot IV / Mending Diamond Armor, Sharpness V Swords, Gapples, Potions, Wind Charges, and Pearls.

### 📜 Commands

* `/army spawn <count>` - Spawns a specified number of unique bots.
* `/army state idle` - Orders all bots to hold their current position.
* `/army state patrol` - Orders all bots to begin roaming securely.
* `/army attack <target>` - Orders the entire army to swarm a specific player.
* `/army stop` - Halts all combat and resets the army to IDLE state.
